ddls:
CREATE TABLE "state_data" (
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state data entry */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., CW) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare facility */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied_estimated" INTEGER /* Estimated number of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied_ll" INTEGER /* Lower limit of the estimated number of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "inpatient_beds_occupied_ul" INTEGER /* Upper limit of the estimated number of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied_estimated" REAL /* Estimated percentage of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied_ll" REAL /* Lower limit of the estimated percentage of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "percentage_inpatient_beds_occupied_ul" REAL /* Upper limit of the estimated percentage of inpatient beds occupied */,
  "total_inpatient_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of inpatient beds */,
  "total_inpatient_beds_ll" INTEGER /* Lower limit of the total number of inpatient beds */,
  "total_inpatient_beds_ul" INTEGER /* Upper limit of the total number of inpatient beds */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state (e.g., CW) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "healthcare_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the state */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the state information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the state information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection log */,
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state data entry */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the data */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the log */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_state_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_data_id") REFERENCES state_data ("state_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collector (e.g., Data Analyst, Field Collector) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the collector */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the collector's information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collector's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Data Analyst, Researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user's information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the state data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the state data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the access log */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_data_id") REFERENCES state_data ("state_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the state data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_state_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_data_id") REFERENCES state_data ("state_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "state_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state data entry */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., informational, critical) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_state_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_data_id") REFERENCES state_data ("state_data_id")
)
